architecture.summary: File-based queue + detached worker process + SSE push. Follows existing clone-worker pattern. State in .specweave/state/skill-submissions.json.

integrations.summary: GitHub Search API (native fetch), existing SecurityScanner (Tier 1), SecurityJudge (Tier 2), SSE infrastructure, BackgroundJobManager.

ui-ux.summary: Onboarding CTA for empty states with Start Scanner button. 4 sections: Scanner Status, Queue table, Verified gallery, Insights. Follows existing dashboard dark theme patterns.

performance.summary: Medium scale 500-5000 skills. Pagination 20/page with server-side filtering. Monthly pruning of rejected entries. GitHub rate limiting with backoff. 60min default scan interval.

security.summary: Tier 1 auto-scan on discover. Tier 2 requires consent gate. GITHUB_TOKEN optional for higher rate limits. No PII stored. Audit trail via submission status history.

edge-cases.summary: Auto-recovery: backup queue before writes, validate JSON on load, rebuild from backup if corrupted. Scanner auto-restarts via job manager. Checkpoint-based resume after crash.
